message.content:
This is a **developer portfolio app's homepage/landing screen** displayed within a smartphone frame. Here's a detailed breakdown of the app content:


### **1. Overall Layout & Structure**  
The screen uses a **vertical, single-column layout** with a dark theme. Content is centered and aligned to the left, with consistent spacing between elements. The background features a **dark gradient** (black to deep purple/navy) that creates depth.


### **2. Header Section**  
- **Top Bar**:  
  - **Left**: A circular profile picture (small, white-bordered) next to the text "Bruno Pau." (name truncated).  
  - **Right**: A "Menu" button (white text, small font) and a "Download CV" button (white text, slightly larger font).  
  - **Language Toggle**: Two buttons ("PT" and "EN") for Portuguese/English, with "EN" highlighted (white background, black text) and "PT" in a darker shade (gray background, white text).  


### **3. Hero Section (Introduction)**  
- **Text Elements**:  
  - "HELLO, MY NAME IS BRUNO" (uppercase, bright green text, medium font size).  
  - "And I build websites." (uppercase, bright green text, slightly larger font than the first line, emphasizing the core service).  
- **Subtext**:  
  - "Full Stack MERN Developer |" (white text, smaller font).  
  - "MongoDB - Express - React - Node.js |" (white text, same size as the line above, listing tech stack).  
  - "Creating efficient, scalable web applications" (white text, same size).  
  - "focused on user experience." (white text, same size, highlighting a key value).  


### **4. Projects Section**  
- **Title**: "Projects" (white text, medium font size, bold).  
- **Placeholder Card**: A rectangular placeholder (dark gray/purple gradient, rounded corners) for project previews—currently empty, indicating this is a section header or the start of a project gallery.  


### **5. Visual & Stylistic Details**  
- **Colors**:  
  - Background: Dark gradient (black → deep purple/navy).  
  - Text: Bright green (hero text) and white (subtext, buttons, titles).  
  - Buttons: "Menu" (white text, transparent background); "Download CV" (white text, transparent background); "PT"/"EN" (gray/white backgrounds, white/black text).  
- **Spacing**: Generous vertical padding between sections (hero, subtext, projects) for readability.  
- **Icons/Buttons**: Minimal—only the profile picture, "Menu," "Download CV," and language toggle buttons. No additional icons visible.  


### **6. Purpose & Context**  
This screen serves as the **homepage of a developer's portfolio**, introducing Bruno (a Full Stack MERN developer) and his focus (web applications, user experience). The "Projects" section suggests a gallery of work (currently empty in this view) to showcase his skills. The dark gradient and green text create a modern, tech-focused aesthetic, aligning with a developer's brand.
